fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure users can open the application using a pre-defined voice keyword with auto listen turned on

Pre-Conditions:
Application is not open
fields.name: Keyword voice activation with auto-listen

testRunSteps.expectedResult: window to speak and save keyword should pop up

testRunSteps.action: Speak keyword 3 times to complete saving process
testRunSteps.expectedResult: green check mark next to keyword activation
screen should be off
screen should turn on and application should open

fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure users can open the application using a pre-defined voice keyword after double click

Pre-Conditions:
Application is not open
fields.name: Keyword voice activation with double click

testRunSteps.expectedResult: window to speak and save keyword should pop up

testRunSteps.action: Speak keyword 3 times to complete saving process
testRunSteps.expectedResult: green check mark next to keyword activation
screen should be off
'listening' icon should appear
testRunSteps.result: icon did not appear. Nothing happened.

testRunSteps.expectedResult: screen should turn on and application should open

fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure users can import and invite their friends on Facebook.

Pre-Conditions:
User has logged into the mobile applicatoin
fields.name: Connect with Facebook

testRunSteps.expectedResult: Facebook login appears
Friends list pops up
Friend list screen pops up

testRunSteps.action: verify that friends list is populated
testRunSteps.expectedResult: All of your friends should now show up in the list and you should be able to click on each one to invite them to join the service

fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure users can synchronize their music between their devices

Pre-Conditions:
User has logged in and navigated to the 'add to favorites' screen
fields.name: Add song to 'my favorites' and sync

testRunSteps.expectedResult: song should now show up in favorites window

testRunSteps.action: log in with a new device

testRunSteps.expectedResult: the new song should be in the list

fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure users can add 5 devices to their account with a 'premium' subscription

Pre-Conditions:
User has logged in and is using a premium subscription
fields.name: support 5 devices

testRunSteps.expectedResult: list should be blank
key-code should populate

testRunSteps.action: log in on a new device

testRunSteps.expectedResult: window should pop up to enter sync key-code
new device should now show up in devices window

testRunSteps.action: repeat 4 more times with new devices
testRunSteps.expectedResult: 5 devices should now be listed
message should appear notifying user that maximum devices have been reached.

fields.description:
Goals

The primary goal of each release will be to test all new features. Feature regression testing will be done based on the following criteria.

  • If directly related to new feature
  • All primary flows or core features
  • Alternate flows time permitting

 

 

Roles and Responsibilities

  • QA Manager will determine test categories based on the goals outlined.
  • Testers will run all assigned tests and log any found defects

 

 

Environment(s)

The application is accessed via supported mobile devices through the app store.
fields.name: Mobile Devices

fields.description: SAFe® Big Picture is a registered mark of Scaled Agile, Inc. For more information on the Scaled Agile methodology: http://www.scaledagileframework.com/
fields.name: Scaled Agile Framework® (SAFe®)

fields.description: Increase subscription growth by 15% by FY 2017
fields.name: Grow Subscriptions

fields.description: Add more ways to access streaming radio in more industries. We need to increase our footprint in the automotive industry and break into the airline industry.
fields.name: Increase Accessibilitiy

fields.description: With a transition towards touch and voice, we need to stay ahead of the curve in these areas. We need to improve the user interface and come up with new ways to interact with our devices
fields.name: Improve user experience

fields.description: We are seeing a growing trend towards mobile. We are also seeing trends towards on demand streaming music. We need to make sure we stay ahead of the curve with these technologies.
fields.name: Keep up with new technology

fields.description: For FY 2016 we need to make more of a focus on partnering with existing companies like mobile and automotive vs. getting our devices into peoples hands.
fields.name: Grow Partnerships

fields.description:
Position Statement
For U.S. homeowners
who are early adopters of home automation
the Pulse Home Integration
is a integration to wifi-enabled home systems
that allows homeowners to utilize a Pulse subscription to wirelessly play Pulse satellite stations through home audio systems 
Unlike existing solutions based on device apps
our solution will allow voice commands to start, stop music and request stations
Scope
Success Criteria
  • Partner with top 3 home audio system providers to integrate Pulse product
  • Cross-market with home audio system providers
In Scope:
  •  
  • y
Out of Scope
  • x
  • y
NFRs:
  • x
  • y

 

 

With the introduction of home automation and smart TVs, we need to make sure subscribing users are able access their subscriptions in as many ways as possible when in their home.
fields.name: Give users more ways to access in the home

fields.description:
Position Statement
For existing subscribers
who are traveling by car
the PulseCarApp
is a integrated car app
that can seamlessly switch between satellite and local network sources
Unlike mobile device audio apps that cannot connect with satellite
our solution does not require mobile device or internet service
Scope
Success Criteria
  • x
  • y
In Scope:
  • x
  • y
Out of Scope
  • x
  • y
NFRs:
  • x
  • y
fields.name: Give users more ways to access when traveling

For Existing and prospective customers
who want to listen to specific artists or songs
the on demand service
is a is a new subscription tier
that allows listeners to pick specific songs, artists, and albums
Unlike existing streaming services
our solution allows users to switch seamlessly to curated radio stations and on demand playlists
Scope

fields.description:
Position Statement
For Chinese prospective customers
who listen to music
the satellite radio
is a new offering
that to stream music in homes, cars, and devices
Unlike that doesn't require local media (cd, mp3 file) or radio signal 
our solution reaches all localities of China
Scope
Success Criteria
  • 500K subscribers by FY 2018

fields.description:
Position Statement
For Existing subscribers
who use smart phones/tablet devices
the  Satellite Radio on the Go
is a mobile application
that provides music entertainment
Unlike that pulls from both internet streaming and satellite sources
our solution to give more curated music options than current streaming services
Scope
Success Criteria
  • 25k downloads in first year
  • y
In Scope:
  • iOS
  • Android
  • Windows Mobile
Out of Scope
  • Desktop version

  • y
fields.name: Add and improve mobile applications

fields.description:
Position Statement
For customers and prospective customers
who actively use social media and cloud applications
the invite friends incentive
is a stimulator 
that for the addition of new subscribers.
Unlike our current solution
our solution will enable us to grow our subscriber base faster.
Scope
Success Criteria

fields.description:
Position Statement
For Existing Customers
who have family subscription
the sharing of devices
is a opportunity to share musical discoveries across family users
that provides ability to share preferences, interests, settings
Unlike current single user streaming services
our solution will seamlessly transfer settings across devices
Scope
Success Criteria
  • When moving to a shared device, Pulse radio will seamlessly allow users to switch profiles and share musical interests with family members
In Scope:
  • Playlists
  • Music Favorites
  • Settings & Preferences
Out of Scope
  • x
  • y
NFRs:
  • x
  • y
fields.name: Improve sharing among devices

fields.description:
Position Statement
For subscribers
who want a flexible pricing package
the tiered subscription levels
is a mechanism that gives a subscriber pricing choices
that enables subscribers to save money or expand subscriptions to family members.
Unlike our other streaming services such as Wave Radio
our solution will extend to more devices and family members.
Scope
Success Criteria
  • x
  • y
In Scope:
  • x
  • y
Out of Scope

  • y

  • y

fields.name: Sample

fields.description: Take advantage of the advancements in touch screen capabilities and voice recognition. We can improve the user experience and increase adoptability by allowing users to interact with their music hands free on the go and with easy hand gestures.
fields.name: Focus on touch and voice interation

fields.description: Sample
fields.name: Sample

fields.description: Allow the user to navigate their playlists using their voice
fields.name: support voice recogntion

fields.description: New technologies and products are allowing better interaction with mobile through touch. Make sure we can support the new devices on the market
fields.name: Improve Touch screen interface
Friends list does not import from Twitter

fields.description: In order to support a new market in China, we need to be able to support their network which operates on a different frequency than US and europe
fields.name: Chinese subscription service

fields.description: We are moving towards supporting on demand. Now you can play any song you wish on top of the radio options previously provide. We need to support this in the mobile UI
fields.name: Support On Demand

fields.description: The mobile app needs to support the new premium subscription tier and the new functionality that it allows
fields.name: Support for Premium Subscription

fields.description:
User interface needs an easy and intuitive way to add invite new friends to join your music network. 

 

Need to build in benefit to having friends in your network
fields.name: Easy way to invite friends

fields.description:
we need to make sure there is no disruption between activity.

 

As an example, if a user is playing music on their phone and they get in their car, the car needs to pick up where the phone left off.
fields.name: Communication between devices

fields.description:
we need to develop a mobile version that works on the new smart watches

 

**WAIT FOR V2 smart watch to develop**
fields.name: Support for smart watch interface

fields.description: Need an option to link to social media. Any friends who are not subscribers, you can invite them via social media
fields.name: Link to social media

fields.description: Mobile needs to support the new 3D touch interface that has recently hit the market
fields.name: 3D touch

fields.description: on top of the streaming radio, we now need to support on demand listening for premium subscriptions only
fields.name: On demand music

fields.description: Need to support WCDMA frequency for Chinese cariers
fields.name: WCDMA support

fields.description: Need to support GSM frequency for Chinese cariers
fields.name: GSM support

fields.description:
1. listen mode for auto activate when in sleep mode.
  2. double tap to start voice recognition when in sleep mode.
fields.name: Home Screen voice activation

fields.description:
Need to support up to 5 connected devices. 

 

Sync needs to be continuous and allow whats being listened to on 1 device to immediately be picked up on another
fields.name: Continuous sync with connected devices

fields.description: The new premium subscription service allows up to 5 devices to be connected. The mobile app needs to be able to track these devices and connect with them
fields.name: Support for 5 devices

fields.description: Platform shall support the addition of unlimited number of radio channels
fields.name: Channel Scalability

fields.description: The platform shall provide signal loss less than 1% across the entire footprint area.
fields.name: Signal performance

fields.description: All software code shall pass OWASP security compliance tests.
fields.name: OWASP Security Standards Adherance

fields.description:
As a User with any subscription service
I can Connect my Twitter account
So that I can automatically invite friends to subscribe and share music
fields.name: Connect with Twitter

fields.description:
As a subscribed user
I can interact with the user interface dependent on the pressure I apply to the screen
So that I can support new interactions made possible by mobile 3D touch capabilities
fields.name: New 3D touch gestures

fields.description:
As a premium user
I can search for any song and play it
So that compete with on demand streaming companies
fields.name: Search for on demand music

fields.description:
As a Premium user
I can save on demand songs I like
So that I can play my favorite songs at any time without having to wait for it to come on
fields.name: Saved Playlists

fields.description:
As a Premium user
I can See what my friends are listening to and play their favorite songs
So that Promote inviting friends which in turn will increase subscriptions
fields.name: Share music

fields.description:
As a traveling user
I can automatically utilize the best frequency available
So that Support in other countries like China to grow subscriptions internationally is easy.
fields.name: Auto-select frequency

fields.description:
As a Subscribed user
I can choose touch sensitivity and supported gestures in the user preferences
So that have a user experience that is tailored to what I like
fields.name: 3D touch preferences

fields.description:
As a subscribed user
I can choose which supported social media service I want to connect to and easily connect through a simple wizard
So that adoption and inviting friends is easy and intuitive to drive more subscriptions
fields.name: Social media screen

fields.description:
As a User with any subscription service
I can Connect my Instagram account
So that I can automatically invite friends to subscribe and share music
fields.name: Connect with Instagram

fields.description:
As a User with any subscription service
I can Connect my Facebook account
So that I can automatically invite friends to subscribe and share music
fields.name: connect with Facebook

fields.description:
As a User with premium subscription
I can set a preference in settings to allow speaking a keyword to activate my application
So that I can interact with my device hands free
fields.name: auto active with voice keyword

fields.description:
As a user with premium subscription
I can double click on screen when asleep to activate voice recognition
So that I can easily use hands free when I don't want to use a keyword for activation
fields.name: double click to activate voice recognition

fields.description:
As a satellite radio company
I can utilize an already existing open source voice library
So that I can eliminate rework for developers and utilize already proven technology
fields.name: Use open source language library

fields.description:
As a user with any subscription service
I can see what my other devices are doing and play what they are playing
So that easily share among friends and family and pick up where Ieft off when changing devices
fields.name: auto sync between devices

fields.description:
As a Premium subscriber
I can connect up to 5 devices with my account
So that I can use my services in multiple areas (car, home, smart phone, watch, laptop) without interruption or having to log out and log in.
fields.name: 5 Devices support for premium subscriptions

fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure that 3D touch gestures are working correctly with song selection

Pre-Conditions:
User has logged is viewing a song list
fields.name: 3D touch song selection

testCaseSteps.action: lightly touch a song in a list
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: song should get highlighted
single song view should come up for that song

testCaseSteps.action: press and hold, move finger to the right
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: song should fast forward to where your finger ends up
song list view should now be in view

fields.description:
Goal of Test Case:
The goal of this test case is to ensure users can access all supported social media sites easily and choose to connect to each one.

Pre-Conditions:
User has logged in and is currently connected to Facebook only
fields.name: Social media window

testCaseSteps.action: list of supported and connected sites should show up
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: you should see Facebook in the connected sites section.
